title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud infrastructure, potentially leading to data loss, operational disruption, and financial damage. The use of compromised CI/CD pipelines increases the risk of widespread impact across development and production environments.
recommended_actions: Conduct an immediate audit of CI/CD pipelines to identify and remediate any vulnerabilities or unauthorized access.
Implement robust backup strategies for cloud-based data and ensure backups are stored offline or in a secure environment.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and mitigate ransomware activity in real time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat, but its usage could lead to potential risks if improperly configured or if malicious actors exploit its functionality to identify vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, reliance on such tools without proper validation may lead to false positives or negatives.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's credibility and security before integrating it into workflows.
Ensure proper configuration and access controls to prevent misuse or unauthorized access.
Use the scanner as a supplementary tool, and validate its findings with manual or other automated checks.

title: FalkorDB Browser 1.9.3 contains an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability in the file...
description: FalkorDB Browser 1.9.3 contains an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability in the file upload API that allows remote attackers to write arbitrary files and achieve remote code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6057.

title: A plaintext storage of a password vulnerability in Synology SSL VPN Client before 1.4.5-0684...
description: A plaintext storage of a password vulnerability in Synology SSL VPN Client before 1.4.5-0684 allows remote attackers to access or influence the user's PIN code due to insecure storage. This may lead to unauthorized VPN configuration and potential interception of subsequent VPN traffic when combined with user interaction.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2021-47961.

title: Denial of Service via Out of Memory vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Client, Apache ActiveMQ...
description:
Denial of Service via Out of Memory vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ Client, Apache ActiveMQ Broker, Apache ActiveMQ.

ActiveMQ NIO SSL transports do not correctly handle TLSv1.3 handshake KeyUpdates triggered by clients. This makes it possible for a client to rapidly trigger updates which causes the broker to exhaust all its memory in the SSL engine leading to DoS.

Note: TLS versions before TLSv1.3 (such as TLSv1.2) are broken but are not vulnerable to OOM. Previous TLS versions require a full

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-39304.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

usb: gadget: f_mass_storage:...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

usb: gadget: f_mass_storage: Fix potential integer overflow in check_command_size_in_blocks()

The `check_command_size_in_blocks()` function calculates the data size
in bytes by left shifting `common->data_size_from_cmnd` by the block
size (`common->curlun->blkbits`). However, it does not validate whether
this shift operation will cause an integer overflow.

Initially, the block size is set up in `fsg_lun_open()` , and the
`com

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-31412.

title: A files or directories accessible to external parties vulnerability in Synology SSL VPN Client...
description: A files or directories accessible to external parties vulnerability in Synology SSL VPN Client before 1.4.5-0684 allows remote attackers to access files within the installation directory via a local HTTP server bound to the loopback interface. By leveraging user interaction with a crafted web page, attackers may retrieve sensitive files such as configuration files, certificates, and logs, leading to information disclosure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to access sensitive files such as configuration files, certificates, and logs, potentially leading to information disclosure and further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Update the Synology SSL VPN Client to version 1.4.5-0684 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the loopback interface and monitor network traffic for suspicious activity.
Educate users about the risks of interacting with unknown or suspicious web pages to minimize exploitation.

title: The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to,...
description: The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 2.1.4. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to uninstall and deactivate the plugin and delete plugin options. NOTE: This vulnerability is also exploitable via a Cross-Site Request Forgery vector.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4162.

title: This vulnerability exists in the Atom 3x Projector due to improper exposure of the Android Debug...
description: This vulnerability exists in the Atom 3x Projector due to improper exposure of the Android Debug Bridge (ADB) service over the local network without authentication or access controls. An unauthenticated attacker on the same network can exploit this vulnerability to obtain root-level access, leading to complete compromise of the targeted device.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers on the same network to gain root-level access to the Atom 3x Projector, potentially leading to device compromise, data exfiltration, malware deployment, or use as a pivot point for further attacks.
recommended_actions: Disable the Android Debug Bridge (ADB) service on all Atom 3x Projector devices unless explicitly required and ensure it is not exposed to the local network.
Implement network segmentation to isolate devices like projectors from sensitive systems and critical infrastructure.
Apply any firmware or software updates provided by the vendor that address CVE-2026-5777 as soon as they become available.

title: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. This...
description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file /util/RegisterCustomerFunction.php. Such manipulation of the argument BRANCH_ID leads to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6038.

title: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. The...
description: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /BranchManagement/ServiceAndSalesReport.php. The manipulation of the argument BRANCH_ID leads to cross site scripting. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or malicious code execution on users' browsers. This can compromise user trust and system integrity.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) utilizing the Vehicle Showroom Management System
recommended_actions: Apply input validation and sanitization to the BRANCH_ID parameter to prevent malicious script injection.
Update the Vehicle Showroom Management System to the latest version if a patch is available, or contact the vendor for remediation guidance.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests targeting this vulnerability.

Executing a manipulation of the argument BRANCH_ID can lead to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.

title: Livestatus injection in the notification test mode in Checkmk <2.5.0b4 and <2.4.0p26 allows an...
description: Livestatus injection in the notification test mode in Checkmk <2.5.0b4 and <2.4.0p26 allows an authenticated user with access to the notification test page to inject arbitrary Livestatus commands via a crafted service description.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated user with access to the notification test page in Checkmk to inject arbitrary Livestatus commands. This could lead to unauthorized actions, data manipulation, or potential disruption of monitoring services.
recommended_actions: Update Checkmk to versions 2.5.0b4 or 2.4.0p26 (or later) to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the notification test page to only trusted and essential personnel.
Monitor logs for any suspicious activity related to Livestatus commands and review access permissions.

title: A vulnerability was determined in CodeAstro Online Classroom 1.0. Affected is an unknown function...
description: A vulnerability was determined in CodeAstro Online Classroom 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /updatedetailsfromstudent.php?eno=146891650. Executing a manipulation of the argument fname can lead to sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to perform SQL injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database manipulation, or service disruption.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input sanitization and parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.
Update to the latest patched version of CodeAstro Online Classroom if available or contact the vendor for a fix.
Monitor logs for unusual database activity and implement web application firewalls (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests.

title: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Notepad++ version 8.9.3 in the file drop...
description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Notepad++ version 8.9.3 in the file drop handler component. When a user drags and drops a directory path of exactly 259 characters without a trailing backslash, the application appends a backslash and null terminator without proper bounds checking, resulting in a stack buffer overflow and application crash (STATUS_STACK_BUFFER_OVERRUN).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an attacker to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow, potentially leading to application crashes or arbitrary code execution. This could be leveraged for denial of service (DoS) attacks or to execute malicious payloads on the victim's system.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of Notepad++ as soon as it becomes available.
Avoid dragging and dropping directory paths into Notepad++ until the vulnerability is resolved.
Implement endpoint protection tools to monitor and block potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-35539 - An issue was discovered in Roundcube Webmail before 1.5.14 and 1.6.14. XSS exists because of insuffi
description: An issue was discovered in Roundcube Webmail before 1.5.14 and 1.6.14. XSS exists because of insufficient HTML attachment sanitization in preview mode. A victim must preview a text/html attachment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser by exploiting insufficient sanitization of HTML attachments in preview mode. This can lead to data theft, session hijacking, or further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Roundcube Webmail to version 1.5.14 or 1.6.14 to patch the vulnerability.
Educate users to avoid previewing untrusted or unexpected email attachments, especially those with HTML content.
Enable additional email security measures such as attachment scanning and content sanitization at the mail gateway level.

description: An issue was discovered in Roundcube Webmail before 1.5.14 and 1.6.14. Unsanitized IMAP SEARCH command arguments could lead to IMAP injection or CSRF bypass during mail search.

title: CVE-2026-5452 - A flaw has been found in UCC CampusConnect App up to 14.3.5 on Android. This vulnerability affects u
description: A flaw has been found in UCC CampusConnect App up to 14.3.5 on Android. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file campusconnect/BuildConfig.java of the component campusconnect.ucc. This manipulation causes use of hard-coded cryptographic key . The attack can only be executed locally. The exploit has been published and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the UCC CampusConnect App allows attackers with local access to exploit a hard-coded cryptographic key, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data or application manipulation. However, the attack requires local access, which limits its scope.
recommended_actions: Update the UCC CampusConnect App to a patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Audit the application codebase to remove hard-coded cryptographic keys and implement secure key management practices.
Educate users to avoid installing untrusted applications or granting unnecessary permissions to reduce the risk of local exploitation.
